description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-examples/kubernetes-deploy, sets the variable GIT_STRATEGY to none, and defines a single stage named deploy. Add a job called deploy that runs in the deploy stage, targets the production environment with URL http://localhost:30080, and executes the shell command echo "fake deploy". The job does not define any caches, artifacts, or conditional rules, so it runs on every pipeline execution.
